title: vicia lutea subsp. vestita
intro: Vicia lutea subsp. vestita, also known as the yellow vetchling or spring vetch, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Vicia lutea subsp. vestita can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
